The '''Coruscant Military Spaceport''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Ben Skywalker]] arrived here returning from [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
